headline: Forget Stagflation - This Is The Kind Of Market Where I Start Building Positions
summary: Bullish S&P 500 outlook: why cyclical value, asset managers (ARES, BN) and gold streamers (FNV, AEM) look attractive amid stagflation risks. See more here.
